title: Monitoring Helm Chart Values
description: Configuration values for the KubeVirt monitoring Helm chart (ServiceMonitors and PrometheusRules).

global.title: Global Configuration
global.description: Global settings shared across all subcharts. Additional properties are allowed so parent umbrella charts can pass arbitrary global values through Helm.

imageRegistry.title: Image Registry
imageRegistry.description: Global container image registry override. When set, all images will be pulled from this registry.

imagePullSecrets.title: Image Pull Secrets
imagePullSecrets.description: Global list of image pull secrets for authenticating to private registries.

nodeSelector.title: Node Selector
nodeSelector.description: Global node selector applied to all pods.

tolerations.title: Tolerations
tolerations.description: Global tolerations applied to all pods.

kubevirtNamespace.title: KubeVirt Namespace
kubevirtNamespace.description: Global KubeVirt namespace. Used by subcharts that deploy into the KubeVirt namespace.

namespace.title: Namespace
namespace.description: Override the namespace where resources are deployed.

namespace.title: Namespace
namespace.description: Namespace where KubeVirt is deployed. Defaults to global.kubevirtNamespace when left empty.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether to create monitoring resources for CDI.

monitoring.title: Monitoring Configuration
monitoring.description: Global monitoring feature toggles and configuration.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether monitoring is enabled globally for this chart.

namespace.title: Namespace
namespace.description: Namespace where ServiceMonitor resources will be created. Defaults to the target component namespace when left empty.

interval.title: Scrape Interval
interval.description: Prometheus scrape interval for the ServiceMonitors (e.g. 30s, 1m, 5m).

labels.title: Labels
labels.description: Additional labels to add to ServiceMonitor resources for Prometheus discovery.

prometheusRules.title: PrometheusRules
prometheusRules.description: Configuration for PrometheusRule resources (alerting and recording rules).

namespace.title: Namespace
namespace.description: Namespace where PrometheusRule resources will be created. Defaults to the target component namespace when left empty.

labels.title: Labels
labels.description: Additional labels to add to PrometheusRule resources for Prometheus discovery.
